parameters.subject: =Congratulations! Interview Invitation for {{ $json.job_role }}
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $json.job_role }} position. We reviewed your resume and are excited to invite you to the next round of interviews!

Our AI screener rated your resume at {{ $json.score }}/100, matching the key skills required.

Your interview has been automatically scheduled for 30 minutes. Details are in the calendar invitation sent to your email.

Google Meet Link: {{ $json.meet_link }}

We look forward to speaking with you!


Best regards,

HR Recruitment Team

parameters.subject: =Application Update: {{ $json.job_role }}
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for your interest in the {{ $json.job_role }} position at our company. We appreciate you taking the time to apply.

After careful evaluation of your resume, we regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with your application at this time. Our team received a high volume of candidates and we have selected applicants who more closely fit our current requirements.

Here is some constructive feedback generated by our resume evaluation assistant:

{{ $json.reason }}

Skills Matched: {{ JSON.parse($json.skills_matched).join(', ') || 'None identified' }}
Suggested Skills to Acquire: {{ JSON.parse($json.missing_skills).join(', ') || 'None identified' }}

We will keep your profile in our database for future matches. We wish you all the best in your search.


Best regards,

HR Recruitment Team
